0010000001110111 0011100010010001 1 -> sum: 0101100100001001, cout: 0
0101101000010101 0110101100110101 1 -> sum: 1100010101001011, cout: 0
1001000110100110 1010011011000010 1 -> sum: 0011100001101001, cout: 1

0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
